novel_features.name: Full-Text Title Search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across locally synced games, movies, and TV titles
novel_features.rationale: Requires a domain SQLite index over synced title rows; no competing tool offers offline full-text search

novel_features.name: Local Analytics
novel_features.description: Aggregate queries (group-by, counts) over locally synced Metacritic data
novel_features.rationale: Only possible with a local SQLite store populated from the API

novel_features.name: Compound Workflows
novel_features.description: Chain multiple API operations (browse then detail then reviews) in one invocation
novel_features.rationale: Combines several backend.metacritic.com calls behind one agent-friendly command

gaps.detail: defaultSyncResources is empty; the sync command is a runtime no-op until a resource population path is wired, so the transcend layer (search/analytics) has no data by default
Music (albums) is excluded: it has no backend.metacritic.com JSON surface (legacy server-rendered HTML behind Cloudflare), so it does not fit this clean REST entry
The generated analytics command ships generic placeholder examples (messages/author_id) that are not Metacritic-specific

quickstart.description: Browse top games ranked by Metascore
Cross-media search across games, movies, TV, and people
Full title detail: Metascore, user score, summary, release
Check CLI health and API reachability

recipes.description: List critic reviews for a title
List user reviews for a title
List genre/platform/network facets for a medium
